title: HPE security advisory (AV26-217)
description: On March 9, 2026, HPE published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included was a critical update for the following:
products: HPE Aruba Networking AOS-CS  multiple versions
HPE Telco Intelligent Assurance  versions prior to FAS 4.2.14
HPE Telco Intelligent Assurance  versions prior to PDO 4.2.14
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
